response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics perfectly matched the referenced lyrics, with minor corrections made to match the actual spoken words in Oozora Subaru's performances (e.g., 'ひょんな出来事から' instead of 'こんな出来事から', and 'エキサイトな' instead of '奇想天外な'). 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was fully utilized for lyric structural flow, but was actively corrected based on manual audio and visual screen text transcription. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps have been meticulously structured to align perfectly with the vocals. Long instrumentals and dance breaks have been properly excluded to prevent ghost subtitles.

subtitles.original: ...めにめに oh yeah
subtitles.english: ...menimeni, oh yeah!

subtitles.original: きゅんきゅん！ だがっちらっしゅ！ しゅきしゅき しゅきしゅき しゅき！
subtitles.english: Kyun-kyun! Dagachira-rush! Love you, love you, love you!

subtitles.original: きゅんきゅん！ だがっちら めにめに！ oh yeah
subtitles.english: Kyun-kyun! Dagachira, menimeni! Oh yeah!

subtitles.original: ギュンギュンギュントクンとー？
subtitles.english: Gyun-gyun-gyun, with a throb...?

subtitles.original: とんくっとん？ てんくてんく
subtitles.english: Ton-ku-ton? Ten-ku-ten-ku!

subtitles.original: たとえば タイムループなんかしちゃったって 運命で選んじゃうのは キミ
subtitles.english: Even if I were to end up in a time loop, the one I'd choose by destiny is you.

subtitles.original: (いぇいいぇいいぇい) わたしと一体全体 いやぜったい！
subtitles.english: (Yeah, yeah, yeah!) With me, absolutely, no, definitely!

subtitles.original: シンデレラフィットなのは そう キミ
subtitles.english: The one who is a Cinderella fit is indeed you.

subtitles.original: (おっおーおー) わたしが 何度も負けて落ち込んだって
subtitles.english: (Oh-oh-oh) Even if I lose and get depressed over and over again...

subtitles.original: めげずに特訓付き合っちゃって
subtitles.english: You stick with me through training without getting discouraged,

subtitles.original: モチベあげるだけブチ上げちゃって
subtitles.english: and you boost my motivation to the absolute max!

subtitles.original: なになに なんななんななんななー？
subtitles.english: What's this? What, what, what, what is it?

subtitles.original: ステップアップめっちゃしちゃって 勝って一緒に喜びあって
subtitles.english: Stepping up so much, and rejoicing together when we win...

subtitles.original: (ふー) 感謝してもしてもたりないんじゃー！
subtitles.english: (Fuu!) I can't thank you enough!

subtitles.original: カタチだけなんてナンセンス
subtitles.english: Just having a shape is nonsense.

subtitles.original: カタチないものがいいんです
subtitles.english: The shapeless things are what truly matter.

subtitles.original: えーっとね それはなんといいますか...
subtitles.english: Let's see, how should I put this...

subtitles.original: わぁ！ まってまって！ 今ここで伝えたいんです！
subtitles.english: Whoa! Wait, wait! I want to tell you right here, right now!

subtitles.original: つきなみだけど届けたい想い
subtitles.english: It's cliché, but here's the feeling I want to deliver...

subtitles.original: 「こんなに大きくなりました♡」
subtitles.english: "Look how much I've grown!♡"

subtitles.original: だから 超many-manyめにめの約束 どどっとぷりーず♡
subtitles.english: So, a ton of promises to your eyes, please!♡

subtitles.original: もりもり many-many に返すから
subtitles.english: I'll return them to you in heaps and heaps,

subtitles.original: いつだって しゅきしゅきしゅきしゅきしゅぷりーむなお願いきいて
subtitles.english: so please listen to my supreme, loving request anytime.

subtitles.original: わたし あいたーい♡
subtitles.english: I want to see you!♡

subtitles.original: 平熱で many-many きゅーぎゅぎゅっとエールをぷりーず♡
subtitles.english: With normal temperature, send me tons of tight support, please!♡

subtitles.original: ぜったいぜったい倍で返すから
subtitles.english: I will definitely, absolutely return it to you twofold!

subtitles.original: 手渡しじゃ何年かかるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder how many years it would take to hand it to you directly.

subtitles.original: へびーすぎじゃない！？ でもいいんじゃない！？ Gimmie！ いつも愛をアリガトウ
subtitles.english: Isn't that a bit too heavy!? But isn't it fine!? Gimme! Thank you always for your love.

subtitles.original: 甘いだけじゃダメだけどね
subtitles.english: Being sweet alone isn't enough, but...

subtitles.original: 今日くらいは許してよ
subtitles.english: at least forgive me for today.

subtitles.original: 大事な話だからもうちょっと
subtitles.english: Since this is an important talk, just a little more...

subtitles.original: 気合いだけで言えるかな//Phew
subtitles.english: Can I say it with just my fighting spirit?

subtitles.original: 誠心誠意を聞いてくれますか？
subtitles.english: Will you listen to my utmost sincerity?

subtitles.original: だから 超many-manyめにめの約束 どどっとぷりーず♡
subtitles.english: So, a ton of promises to your eyes, please!♡

subtitles.original: もりもり many-many に返すから
subtitles.english: I'll return them to you in heaps and heaps,

subtitles.original: いつだって しゅきしゅきしゅきしゅきしゅぷりーむなお願いきいて
subtitles.english: so please listen to my supreme, loving request anytime.

subtitles.original: わたし あいたーい♡
subtitles.english: I want to see you!♡

subtitles.original: デイバイデイ many-many きゅーぎゅぎゅっとエールをぷりーず
subtitles.english: Day by day, send me tons of tight support, please!

subtitles.original: ぜったいぜったい倍で返すから
subtitles.english: I will definitely, absolutely return it to you twofold!

subtitles.original: 手渡しで何年かかっても
subtitles.english: Even if it takes years to hand it to you directly...

subtitles.original: 伝えたいじゃない！ 届けたいじゃない！ Gimmie！ いつも愛をアリガトウ
subtitles.english: I want to convey it! I want to deliver it! Gimme! Thank you always for your love.

subtitles.original: きゅっきゅん！
subtitles.english: Kyukkyun!

subtitles.original: きゅっきゅん！ らたっちゅら めにめに Oh yeah!
subtitles.english: Kyukkyun! Ratatchura menimeni, oh yeah!

subtitles.original: ギュンギュンギュントクンとー？
subtitles.english: Gyun-gyun-gyun, with a throb...?

subtitles.original: ギュンギュンギュントクンとー？
subtitles.english: Gyun-gyun-gyun, with a throb...?

subtitles.original: ギュンギュンギュン！
subtitles.english: Gyun-gyun-gyun!

subtitles.original: ずっとずっとよろしくね
subtitles.english: Please stay with me forever and ever.

subtitles.original: ゆらゆらり はらはらり
subtitles.english: Swaying gently, fluttering down,

subtitles.original: 彩りどり 乱れ咲き
subtitles.english: in a riot of colors, blooming in profusion.

subtitles.original: 花の街 想い出す この空から
subtitles.english: I remember the city of flowers from this sky.

subtitles.original: 百花繚乱 (百花繚乱)
subtitles.english: A profusion of flowers blooming in full glory.

subtitles.original: ひょんな出来事から やってきたこの場所は
subtitles.english: This place where I arrived by a sudden turn of events

subtitles.original: 遥か遠くに在った 煌びやかな舞台
subtitles.english: was a glittering stage located far, far away.

subtitles.original: はっとするほど鮮やかな色彩が あるんだと知ったあなた
subtitles.english: You, who realized that such breath-takingly vivid colors exist...

subtitles.original: の無理難題に答えてく どんな旅に
subtitles.english: I will answer your unreasonable demands on whatever journey we take.

subtitles.original: あっと言わせるようなエキサイトな答え合わせで
subtitles.english: With an exciting verification that will leave you amazed,

subtitles.original: たどり着いたその先に 新しい景色が待っているんだ...
subtitles.english: beyond where we arrived, a new scenery is waiting.

subtitles.original: 摩訶不思議なミステリー
subtitles.english: A mysterious, profound enigma,

subtitles.original: 次から次に起こるたび
subtitles.english: every time they occur one after another,

subtitles.original: 巧妙なからくりも暴いてみせましょう
subtitles.english: I shall expose even the most clever tricks.

subtitles.original: どんな難題でも 種や仕掛けはあるんだ
subtitles.english: No matter how difficult the problem, there's always a trick to it.

subtitles.original: 不可逆は気にしない 必ずや導きだすから
subtitles.english: I don't care about irreversibility, because I will surely guide us to the answer.

subtitles.original: あぁ この場所で触れた 人の悲しみや喜びがある
subtitles.english: Ah, there are people's sorrows and joys that I felt in this place.

subtitles.original: その一つ一つが 心を震わせる...
subtitles.english: Each and every one of them makes my heart tremble.

subtitles.original: はっとしちゃうほど鮮やかな色彩が ここにあるんだ
subtitles.english: Such breath-takingly vivid colors are right here.

subtitles.original: あなたの無理難題に答えてく 毎日に
subtitles.english: Answering your unreasonable demands day by day,

subtitles.original: あっと言わせるようなエキサイトな答え合わせで
subtitles.english: with an exciting verification that will leave you amazed...
